query:
SELECT gameDate, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM games GROUP BY gameDate ORDER BY gameDate;
SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, sortOrder FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-04' ORDER BY sortOrder LIMIT 50;
